problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
